planning_ready.reason: Required phase-0 planning, spec, contract, acceptance, and run-policy artifacts exist and align to the inspected repository scaffold.

execution_ready.reason: Execution is intentionally paused pending human review of the phase-0 plan and explicit decisions on blocked review gates.
blockers: Phase-0 planning artifacts need review sign-off.
Auth mode for non-bootstrap business routes is not approved yet.
Primary client priority and frontend stack are not selected yet.
Knowledge-source format scope and audio-retention policy need approval.

next_actions: Review the product, module, resource, invariant, and contract specs together.
Approve or adjust the human-gated decisions called out in the product spec and dev plan.
Select the first execution task from planning/dev_plan.yaml after review.
